channel.title: Hotpot.ai on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Hotpot.ai on Tech Tracker

item.title: How to use AI to restore / convert B&W photos to color ones!
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-NDE_cV1fzDU/YRVxFZzvA3I/AAAAAAAAGUw/D6pQmROcDyIGiFG0D4Jj7g8DnmdTJ3lDQCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1628795154645373-0.png" alt=""> Do you have B&W photos? Ever wondered how to convert them to color photos? It is possible to convert B&W photos to colour photos and restore B&W photos if there is any damage but converting or restoring a B&W photo is not easy it requires skills & so much of time if you do in manual way to get desired conversion output. But, if you don’t have skills, time, interest to manually convert B&W photos to color photos or restore them yet you want good results then you have to depend on A.
